name: TypescriptDesignPatterns
description: Interactive reference covering 21 design patterns across Behavioral, Creational, and Structural categories — all implemented in TypeScript with live demos and search.

name: xml-toolbox
description: A browser-based tool for reading and analyzing XML files.

name: json-toolbox
description: A fast, browser-based toolkit for working with JSON — compare documents, analyze structures, visualize data as interactive graphs, and convert between formats without uploading data.
